GPIO initialization, power management, RTC, and temperature sensor drivers for STM32F4.


## Files
- **[gpio_defaults.c](gpio_defaults.c.md)**: Initializes all GPIO pins as analog inputs to save power, with specific exceptions per port.
- **[pwr.c](pwr.c.md)**: Power management functions for STM32F4, including wakeup, flash power down, and backup domain access.
- **[rtc.c](rtc.c.md)**: Real-time clock (RTC) driver for STM32F4, including initialization, time setting, and alarm functions.
- **[temperature.c](temperature.c.md)**: Temperature sensor driver for STM32F4, including initialization and reading functions.
